content: Did anyone work on module parameters yet?

@Andreas Hindborg did in August:
https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/20240819133345.3438739-1-nmi@metaspace.dk/
It’s still on. I am on a conversation with Luis who maintains modules. Alice, could you check if everything you need is in the patch set I sent? It is quite reduced compared to the original work.
We are waiting for the modversion patches to merge before we pick up parameters, thus I have not been in a hurry to send a new version.

The fact that module parameters can be set before module loading, and that my global mutex requires initialization, is a major PITA to deal with right now. Maybe I really need to fix the initialization of mutexes now ...
I'm going to use sysfs instead of module parameters.

Alice Ryhl said:

I'm going to use sysfs instead of module parameters.

That will make @Greg KH happy.
